raw_consumer_statement: This is a merchandise-not-received dispute. The merchant never shipped or delivered any goods, and has provided no proof of delivery, no tracking, no XXXX, and no signed acceptance. American Express denied my dispute because of a separate business disagreement concerning another invoice that was NOT paid using American Express. This is improper. Each transaction must be evaluated independently, and card network rules require proof of delivery for this charge. There is none. I am requesting regulatory review because Amex refused to apply dispute rules and denied the claim without valid delivery evidence. This is regarding 2 transactions, each is in the amount of {$5100.00}, totaling {$10000.00}. Transaction occured on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX  and I have been fighting back and forth all year for this
